Test.bannerDesc: Do you notice signs of Dyslexia, Dyscalculia, Dysgraphia, or Dyspraxia in your child? Take our quick test now.
Test.pageSubtitle: Please answer the following questions with Yes or No, keeping your child's general behavior in mind.
Test.resultDesc: This test is not a medical diagnosis; it is for preliminary evaluation purposes only. Some signs of learning difficulties may be present. Please contact us for a detailed and free assessment by our experts.
Test.q1: Does your child confuse letters or syllables while reading (e.g., b/d, p/q)?
Test.q2: Is their reading speed slow compared to peers, and do they tire quickly while reading?
Test.q3: Do they have difficulty understanding or summarizing the meaning of the text they read?
Test.q4: Do they struggle with recognizing numbers, sequencing, or counting on fingers?
Test.q5: Do they have trouble learning concepts of time (yesterday, today) and reading clocks?
Test.q6: Do they frequently confuse mathematical symbols (+, -, x, /)?
Test.q7: Is their handwriting very messy and illegible compared to their peers?
Test.q8: Do they struggle holding a pencil or press too hard when writing?
Test.q9: Do they have trouble leaving spaces between words or keeping their writing on the line?
Test.q10: Are they behind peers in fine motor skills like buttoning a shirt or zipping?
Test.q11: Do they frequently bump into objects, fall, or show signs of clumsiness?
Test.q12: Do they struggle with physical activities requiring coordination, like catching a ball or jumping?

Kurumsal.pageSubtitle: Love First, Then Success. Hope First, Then the Future. We believe in our children's potential and build the future together with our families.
Kurumsal.storyText: Önce Özel Eğitim was founded in Pendik to provide the highest quality, science-based, and loving educational services to children with special needs and their families. Over the years, our growing team of experts has brought hope and strength to thousands of families. Our central goal is to help every child discover their individual potential and participate fully in society.
Kurumsal.missionText: Believing that every child is unique, to improve their quality of life through evidence-based and love-centered approaches; contributing to their becoming independent, confident, and happy individuals.
Kurumsal.visionText: To be the most trusted, innovative, and accessible center in our region in the field of special education and rehabilitation; serving with an institutional approach that makes every family feel supported.
Kurumsal.val1Desc: We always maintain transparent, open, and trust-based communication with our families.
Kurumsal.val2Desc: We approach every child and family with warmth, understanding, and an empathetic heart.
Kurumsal.val3Desc: We apply programs supported by current research and evidence-based methods.
Kurumsal.val4Desc: In every decision, we prioritize the best interest and individual needs of the child.

Egitimlerimiz.pageSubtitle: 28 comprehensive science-based therapy and education programs delivered by our expert team.
Egitimlerimiz.ctaBannerTitle: Which program is right for your child?
Egitimlerimiz.ctaBannerDesc: Our experts will guide you with a free initial evaluation.
Egitimlerimiz.c1_p1_desc: Specially planned therapy programs for individuals with delayed language development and communication difficulties.
Egitimlerimiz.c1_p2_desc: Intensive speech education applied for children whose language development is behind their peers.
Egitimlerimiz.c1_p3_desc: Scientific therapy sessions supporting fluent speech skills and teaching how to manage stuttering.
Egitimlerimiz.c1_p4_desc: Studies aimed at clear and understandable speech against problems of not being able to produce sounds correctly.
Egitimlerimiz.c1_p5_desc: Expert support programs for language loss and speech apraxia due to neurological reasons.
Egitimlerimiz.c2_p1_desc: Support program that enables individuals to overcome difficulties in skills such as reading and writing.
Egitimlerimiz.c2_p2_desc: Special learning therapy aimed at developing the skills to understand and calculate mathematical concepts.
Egitimlerimiz.c2_p3_desc: Structured education aiming to overcome writing difficulties by developing fine motor skills.
Egitimlerimiz.c2_p4_desc: Educations that facilitate the cognitive, motor, and social adaptation of preschool children to primary school.
Egitimlerimiz.c2_p5_desc: Individual lessons offered to increase students' school success and enable them to fully use their potential.
Egitimlerimiz.c3_p1_desc: Comprehensive special education programs developing the social communication and independent living skills of individuals with autism.
Egitimlerimiz.c3_p2_desc: Therapies focused on extending attention span, managing impulsivity, and gaining organizational skills.
Egitimlerimiz.c3_p3_desc: Programs supporting the physical, mental, and social development of individuals with Down syndrome with a holistic approach.
Egitimlerimiz.c3_p4_desc: Individual counseling services to overcome social interaction difficulties and adapt more comfortably to daily life.
Egitimlerimiz.c3_p5_desc: Education plans supporting various delays and deviations experienced in developmental processes with scientific methods.
Egitimlerimiz.c4_p1_desc: Movement and play-based therapy that enables accurate perception and response to sensory stimuli from the environment.
Egitimlerimiz.c4_p2_desc: Functional improvement sessions aiming for individuals to gain independence in daily living activities.
Egitimlerimiz.c4_p3_desc: Applied Behavior Analysis methods focusing on increasing desired behaviors and decreasing unwanted ones.
Egitimlerimiz.c4_p4_desc: Program providing the development of physical coordination, balance, and motor skills through sports and play activities.
Egitimlerimiz.c4_p5_desc: Expert physiotherapist supports increasing muscle, joint, and movement capability by minimizing physical limitations.
Egitimlerimiz.c4_p6_desc: Interaction-based therapy targeting emotional development and two-way communication by participating in the child's play.
Egitimlerimiz.c5_p1_desc: Mental training elevating memory, reasoning, problem-solving, and analytical thinking skills to the highest level.
Egitimlerimiz.c5_p2_desc: Support monitoring children's physical development appropriate for their age and offering them special physical development plans.
Egitimlerimiz.c5_p3_desc: Therapy enabling children to express their emotional worlds through play and establish healthy relationships with peers.
Egitimlerimiz.c5_p4_desc: Service helping families overcome difficulties encountered in the special education process and manage the home process.
Egitimlerimiz.c5_p5_desc: Intensive, accommodated, and holistic camp programs aiming to provide maximum development in a short time.
Egitimlerimiz.c5_p6_desc: Support focused on protecting individuals' mental health and increasing their skills to cope with emotional problems.
Egitimlerimiz.c5_p7_desc: Preventive and supportive education services for children aged 0-3 at risk of developmental delay and their families.

FAQ.sectionSubtitle: Find answers to your questions here.
FAQ.q1: Is the initial assessment consultation free?
FAQ.a1: Yes, the initial pre-assessment consultation with our experts is completely free. During this meeting, your child's developmental needs are identified and a personalized roadmap is created.
FAQ.q2: How long does a session last?
FAQ.a2: Our individual therapy and education sessions are 45-50 minutes, and social skills group sessions are 60 minutes.
FAQ.q3: What age groups do you work with?
FAQ.a3: Our center provides comprehensive support services to children and adolescents between the ages of 2-18.
FAQ.q4: What should we do to start education?
FAQ.a4: You can reach us by phone, email, or by filling out the form on our website. Creating an appointment is the first step; our experts will guide you.
FAQ.q5: How can I track my child's progress?
FAQ.a5: Regular progress reports are prepared according to the goals set for each child, and periodic family briefing meetings are organized. We manage the process together.

Hizmetlerimiz.pageSubtitle: From intensive camp programs to international accommodation services, we are by your side for every need.
Hizmetlerimiz.pageSlogan: Love First, Then Success. Hope First, Then the Future.
Hizmetlerimiz.section1Para1: Meet our Camp Education model, specially designed for families coming from out of town, joining from abroad, or aiming for maximum development in limited time. Unlike standard education programs, our students undergo an intensive and holistic education of 25-30 hours per week.
Hizmetlerimiz.section1Para2: Planned in periods of 1, 3, 6 or 9 months, this process centers not only on educating our student, but also the family. We involve families in lessons, teach them materials to use at home, and guide them through every step from nutrition to crisis management.
Hizmetlerimiz.section1Para3: After the camp, families return home and practice what they’ve learned for 2 months, then come back to our center to be hosted again for follow-up progress reviews.
Hizmetlerimiz.section2Title: For Our Families Coming From Abroad
Hizmetlerimiz.section2Step1Desc: We welcome you the moment you land.
Hizmetlerimiz.section2Step2Desc: Your safe home, furnished to meet all your needs.
Hizmetlerimiz.section2Step3Desc: Door-to-door VIP transfer on education days.
Hizmetlerimiz.section2Para1: Education knows no borders. The comfort of our families, especially those coming from abroad and out of town for our camp education, is of utmost importance to us. So you can begin this long-term educational process focused only on your child’s development, without worrying about logistical details, we organize your accommodation and transportation from start to finish.
Hizmetlerimiz.section2Para2: From the moment you land, we welcome you at Sabiha Gökçen Airport and settle you into your safe, carefully furnished home, very close to our center. On education days, we personally provide transfers from your accommodation to our center. You just enjoy your family’s comfort, and let us take care of all the rest.
Hizmetlerimiz.section3Desc: During our camp education, we offer healthy menus prepared by our professional nutrition consultants to support the physical and mental development of our students.
Hizmetlerimiz.section3Item2: Menus prepared with fresh, high-quality ingredients
Hizmetlerimiz.section3Item3: Nutrition programs tailored to the child's needs
Hizmetlerimiz.section3Item4: Meal options suited to families' preferences and sensitivities
